description: Tech-Priest logistics drones, Cogitator Stations, Work State tabs, Machine-Spirit ledger traits, emergency machinery, station-owned defense perimeters, physical acquisition movement, construction placement authority, active leaf task truth, and 0.1.657 visual intent lines plus adjacent mineable crash-wreck salvage for known-source logistics fetches.
